summary: Comprehensive testing of Enhanced TLS Document Verification System completed successfully. All new features (document metadata, branded QR codes, camera scanning, earnings dashboard) are working correctly. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Received true for a non-boolean attribute jsx' - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

backend_api_tests: POST /api/documents/stamp with document_type, description, recipient_name, recipient_org
POST /api/documents/stamp with different document types (contract, affidavit, power_of_attorney, deed, court_filing, legal_opinion)
GET /api/verify/stamp/{stamp_id} returns extended fields (document_type, recipient_name, recipient_org, description)
GET /api/verify/stamp/{invalid_id} returns valid=false with appropriate message
GET /api/documents/stamps returns list with new fields
GET /api/stamp-types returns available stamp types with prices
frontend_ui_tests: Document Stamp page loads with all new fields (Document Type dropdown, Description textarea, Recipient Name, Organization)
Stamp Customization section shows stamp types with prices, color picker, display options checkboxes
Verification page has 3 tabs (Stamp ID, Scan QR, Upload)
Scan QR tab shows camera interface with 'Open Camera' button
Upload tab shows file upload for document verification
Earnings Dashboard shows Total Earnings, Monthly Earnings, Total Verifications
Earnings Dashboard shows 'How You Earn' section with 30% revenue share info
Earnings Dashboard shows Recent Verifications with stamp IDs and earnings
My Stamps tab shows stamps with branded QR codes, document info, verification counts, earnings
Verification result page shows extended fields (Document Type, Recipient, Organization, SHA-256 hash)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test stamps created during testing with various document types and brand colors
context_for_next_testing_agent: All enhanced features tested and working. New test file at /app/backend/tests/test_enhanced_features.py covers document metadata, branded QR codes, earnings API. Verification page has 3 tabs working. Earnings dashboard shows real-time verification revenue (30% advocate share). Payment integration remains MOCKED.
